project.name: MindForge
project.description: Mind Map Generator — converts unstructured text into visual, exportable mind maps using a multi-agent GenAI pipeline.

system_overview.description: Mind Map Generator using a multi-agent pipeline. User inputs raw text, the pipeline plans, structures, validates, enhances, renders, exports, and tests the mind map autonomously.
system_overview.architecture: Sequential pipeline using single Groq API key
system_overview.flow: User Input → Planner → Structurer → Validator → Enhancer → Renderer → Exporter → Tester

api_config.note: API key must be stored in .env file as GROK_API_KEY — never hardcoded

variable_passing.pipeline_context: Each agent receives the previous agent's output as its input variable. Variables are injected at runtime by the PipelineController.

variables.{{input}}: Raw user text from frontend textarea

agents.name: Planner Agent
agents.description: Analyzes raw user input and extracts the central topic, main branches, and relationships. This is the first stage — if it fails the pipeline stops.

agents.name: Structurer Agent
agents.description: Converts the flat planner output into a strict hierarchical tree JSON. Central topic becomes root, branches become children, sub-topics become nested children.

agents.name: Validator Agent
agents.description: Validates the structured JSON against rules. First applies rule-based checks, then uses LLM to fix any issues found. If validation fails entirely, pipeline continues with best available output.
validation_rules: No duplicate node titles at the same level
No empty or null title fields
Root node must exist and have a title
Every node must have a children array
Maximum 7 children on any single node
agents.prompt_template:
You are a JSON validator and fixer.

Validation rules:
- No duplicate node titles at the same level
- No empty or null title fields — replace with 'Untitled'
- Maximum depth of 4 levels — truncate deeper nodes
- Root node must have a title
- Every node must have a children array (use [] if missing)
- Minimum 2 children on root
- Maximum 7 children per node — merge extras

Fix ALL issues and return the corrected JSON in the SAME schema format.
Return ONLY valid JSON with no markdown.

INPUT:
{{structured_output}}

agents.name: Enhancer Agent
agents.description: Enriches each node with a color, icon emoji, and optional tag. Must not change the title or structure. If this agent fails, pipeline skips enhancement and continues with plain validated output.
agents.prompt_template:
Enhance every node in the JSON tree by adding color, icon, and tag fields.

Rules:
- DO NOT change any title field
- DO NOT change the structure or nesting
- Add 'color': a hex color from this palette: #c8a96e, #7eb8a6, #a47eb8, #7e9eb8, #b87e7e, #7eb87e, #b8a87e, #6ea8c8
- Add 'icon': a single relevant emoji for the node topic
- Add 'tag': 1-2 word category label (optional)
- Use the same color for all children of a parent node
- Root node always gets color #c8a96e

Return ONLY valid JSON with no markdown.

INPUT:
{{validated_output}}

agents.name: Renderer Agent
agents.description: Converts the enhanced JSON tree into an interactive SVG mind map rendered in the browser. Uses D3.js radial tree layout. Supports pan, zoom, and drag-to-reposition nodes. This is a frontend component — no LLM call needed.

interactions: hover tooltip showing tag and icon

output_format.svg_element: Rendered SVG DOM element inside React canvas

agents.failure_fallback: If D3 rendering fails, display raw JSON in a formatted code block

agents.name: Exporter Agent
agents.description: Exports the rendered mind map in three formats: PNG (screenshot of canvas), PDF (jsPDF), and JSON (Miro + Obsidian compatible schema). All exports are triggered by user button click.

tech.PNG: html2canvas v1.4.1 — screenshots the SVG canvas element
tech.PDF: jsPDF v2.5 — embeds the PNG into a PDF document
tech.JSON: Native JSON.stringify — outputs Miro-compatible node/edge schema

agents.failure_fallback: If export fails, show manual copy button for raw JSON

agents.name: Tester Agent
agents.description: Final quality check on the pipeline output. Validates node count consistency, central topic preservation, structure depth, and enhancement completeness. Returns a quality score.
checks: Central topic in output matches central topic from Planner output
Total node count in Renderer output matches Validator output node count
No node has depth greater than 4
All nodes have color field (if Enhancer succeeded)
Export files were generated without error
agents.prompt_template:
Verify the pipeline output quality.

Checks:
✔ Node count consistency between stages
✔ Central topic preserved from input to output
✔ No node exceeds depth 4
✔ All titles are non-empty strings
✔ Structure is valid hierarchical JSON

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "valid": true,
  "issues": [],
  "quality_score": 0.9,
  "agent_statuses": {}
}

pipeline_controller.description: Orchestrates the sequential execution of all agents. Injects outputs from each agent as inputs to the next. Handles retries, skips, and graceful degradation per failure_handling rules. Logs each stage to JSON.
responsibilities: Pass output of agent N as input to agent N+1
Apply retry policy on eligible agents
Apply failure_handling rules on agent failure
Collect and return final TesterAgent report

failure_handling.strategy: Graceful degradation — pipeline continues with best available output at each stage

planner_fails.user_message: Pipeline could not analyze your input. Please try again.

enhancer_fails.user_message: Enhancement skipped — colors and icons not applied.

renderer_fails.user_message: Visual render failed — showing JSON output only.

exporter_fails.user_message: Export failed — use the copy button to save JSON manually.

caching.strategy: Cache Planner output keyed by SHA256 hash of input text. Skip Planner call if same input re-submitted within session.

logging.level: INFO in production, DEBUG in development

components.name: TextInputPanel
components.description: Left sidebar — textarea for raw text input, API key field, sample prompt chips, generate button, agent status indicators

components.name: MindMapCanvas
components.description: Main area — D3.js radial SVG canvas with pan, zoom, drag-node interactions

components.name: ExportBar
components.description: Bottom bar — PNG, PDF, JSON export buttons, enabled only after successful render

components.name: AgentStatusBar
components.description: Shows live pipeline progress: which agent is currently running, success/fail status per stage

components.name: QualityScorePanel
components.description: Shows TesterAgent quality_score and any issues after pipeline completes

endpoints.description: Accepts raw text, runs full pipeline, returns enhanced mind map JSON

components: LLM Agents (Planner, Structurer, Validator, Enhancer, Tester)

sprint_1.goal: Working backend pipeline — Planner + Structurer + FastAPI endpoint
diagrams_required: Sequence diagram: POST /generate → PlannerAgent → StructurerAgent → response

sprint_2.goal: Validator + Enhancer + React frontend with live canvas
diagrams_required: Sequence diagram: Frontend submit → Backend → Validator → Enhancer → Frontend render

sprint_3.goal: Renderer + Exporter + Tester + full test suite
deliverables: PyTest suite with mocked Grok API
diagrams_required: State diagram for app states (idle → generating → rendered → exporting)

testing.mocking_strategy: All Grok API calls must be mocked using pytest-mock. No live API calls in tests. GrokClient is injected as a dependency so it can be replaced with a mock.
unit_tests: test_planner_agent: mock Grok response → assert central_topic is string, branches is list of 3-7 strings
test_planner_agent_invalid_json: mock Grok returns malformed JSON → assert ParseError raised
test_structurer_agent: given valid planner output → assert output has title and children keys
test_structurer_agent_depth: assert output tree depth never exceeds 4
test_validator_agent_duplicates: inject tree with duplicate sibling titles → assert duplicates removed
test_validator_agent_empty_labels: inject node with empty title → assert replaced with Untitled
test_enhancer_agent_colors: assert every node in output has a valid hex color field
test_enhancer_agent_no_title_change: assert no title was modified by enhancer
test_exporter_json_schema: assert exported JSON has nodes, edges, version, title keys
test_tester_agent_quality_score: given clean output → assert quality_score >= 0.9
test_tester_agent_issues: given output with problems → assert valid is false and issues is non-empty
test_pipeline_controller_order: assert agents called in correct sequence
test_pipeline_controller_enhancer_skip: simulate enhancer failure → assert pipeline continues with validator output
system_tests: Input 'Plan an AI startup' → assert output has >= 4 categories and central_topic is non-empty
Input empty string → assert HTTP 422 validation error
Input > 5000 chars → assert input is trimmed to 5000 chars before pipeline runs
Input valid text → assert TesterAgent quality_score >= 0.7
Simulate Grok API timeout → assert pipeline returns 500 with correct error message
gui_tests: Generate button is disabled when textarea is empty
Export buttons only visible after successful map generation
Zoom in/out buttons change SVG transform attribute
PNG export triggers file download with .png extension
JSON export file contains valid parseable JSON

functional_requirements: FR1: System shall accept raw unstructured text input up to 5000 characters
FR2: System shall call Grok API to extract central topic and branches
FR3: System shall convert extracted data into a hierarchical JSON tree
FR4: System shall validate the tree for duplicates, empty labels, and depth violations
FR5: System shall enhance nodes with colors, icons, and tags
FR6: System shall render an interactive SVG mind map with pan, zoom, and drag
FR7: System shall export the mind map as PNG, PDF, or JSON
FR8: System shall report a quality score after pipeline completion
non_functional_requirements: NFR1: Full pipeline execution shall complete within 10 seconds for inputs under 2000 characters
NFR2: System shall use a single GROK_API_KEY stored in environment variables
NFR3: System shall handle Grok API failure gracefully without crashing
NFR4: Exported JSON shall be importable into Miro
NFR5: Application shall work on Chrome, Firefox, and Edge
NFR7: No API key shall ever appear in source code or logs
limitations: No persistent storage — mind maps are session-only unless exported
No offline mode — requires active internet for Grok API calls

backend/.requirements.txt: fastapi, uvicorn, httpx, python-dotenv, pytest, pytest-mock, mutmut

frontend/.package.json: react, d3, html2canvas, jspdf, tailwindcss, vite

docs/.sprint1/: Class diagram + sequence diagram for Sprint 1
docs/.sprint2/: Class diagram + sequence diagram for Sprint 2
docs/.sprint3/: State diagram + activity diagram for Sprint 3
docs/.object_design.md: All class definitions with attributes and methods
docs/.requirements.md: FR + NFR + use cases + user stories
docs/.test_cases.md: All unit, system, GUI test cases documented

antigravity_mission_prompt:
Build the MindForge Mind Map Generator exactly according to this pipeline_config.json specification.

Execute in sprint order:
1. Sprint 1: backend/agents/ (PlannerAgent, StructurerAgent), pipeline_controller.py, main.py
2. Sprint 2: ValidatorAgent, EnhancerAgent, full React frontend with D3.js canvas
3. Sprint 3: RendererAgent, ExporterAgent, TesterAgent, full pytest suite, export buttons

Rules:
- Load GROK_API_KEY from .env — never hardcode it
- After each sprint, run pytest and fix all failures before proceeding to the next sprint
- All Grok API calls must be mockable via dependency injection
- Test coverage must reach >= 95%
- Follow the exact folder_structure defined in this config
- Use the prompt_templates exactly as written for each LLM agent
data_flow: Step 1 — User Input: Raw unstructured text (max 5000 chars) submitted via React TextInputPanel
Step 2 — Planner Agent: Calls Grok API → extracts central_topic, branches[], relationships[]
Step 3 — Structurer Agent: Calls Grok API → converts flat plan into hierarchical title/children tree (max depth 4)
Step 4 — Validator Agent: Rule-based checks + Grok LLM fallback → fixes duplicates, empty labels, depth violations → outputs clean tree
Step 5 — Enhancer Agent: Calls Grok API → adds color (hex), icon (emoji), tag to every node without changing titles
Step 6 — Renderer Agent: Deterministic (D3.js in browser) → computes radial layout positions → renders interactive SVG canvas
Step 7 — Exporter Agent: Deterministic (html2canvas + jsPDF + JSON.stringify) → outputs PNG / PDF / Miro-compatible JSON on user click
Step 8 — Tester Agent: Rule-based + optional Grok call → validates consistency across all stages → returns quality_score (0.0–1.0)
Final Output → User sees interactive SVG mind map + download buttons + quality score panel
sequence_diagram:
1.  User → React UI (TextInputPanel): enters raw text, clicks Generate
2.  React UI → FastAPI /generate: POST { text, api_key }
3.  FastAPI → PipelineController: run(input_text)
4.  PipelineController → PlannerAgent: execute({ input: raw_text })
5.  PlannerAgent → Grok API (grok-3-mini): POST chat/completions with planner prompt_template
6.  Grok API → PlannerAgent: { central_topic, branches[], relationships[] }
7.  PlannerAgent → PipelineController: planner_output JSON
8.  PipelineController → StructurerAgent: execute({ planner_output })
9.  StructurerAgent → Grok API: POST chat/completions with structurer prompt_template
10. Grok API → StructurerAgent: { title, children[] } hierarchical tree
11. StructurerAgent → PipelineController: structured_output JSON
12. PipelineController → ValidatorAgent: execute({ structured_output })
13. ValidatorAgent: run_rules(tree) → detect issues (duplicates, empty labels, depth > 4)
14. [If issues found] ValidatorAgent → Grok API: POST chat/completions with validator prompt_template to auto-fix
15. ValidatorAgent → PipelineController: validated_output JSON (fixed tree)
16. PipelineController → EnhancerAgent: execute({ validated_output })
17. EnhancerAgent → Grok API: POST chat/completions with enhancer prompt_template
18. Grok API → EnhancerAgent: tree with color, icon, tag added to every node
19. EnhancerAgent → PipelineController: enhanced_output JSON
20. PipelineController → FastAPI: return { enhanced_output, pipeline_log }
21. FastAPI → React UI: 200 OK { mind_map, tester_report, pipeline_log }
22. React UI → RendererAgent (D3.js): compute radial layout positions from mind_map JSON
23. RendererAgent → MindMapCanvas: render interactive SVG with pan/zoom/drag
24. MindMapCanvas → AgentStatusBar: update all stages to success
25. MindMapCanvas → QualityScorePanel: display quality_score and issues[]
26. [User clicks Export PNG] → ExportBar → html2canvas: screenshot SVG canvas → trigger .png download
27. [User clicks Export PDF] → ExportBar → jsPDF: embed PNG into PDF → trigger .pdf download
28. [User clicks Export JSON] → ExportBar → JSON.stringify(Miro schema): trigger .json download
